pattern: Cascade two monotonic stacks so an element first finds its next greater value, then is promoted to a second stack where it waits for the value after that.
hints: The second greater element is the value that beats nums[i] only after exactly one earlier value has already beaten it.
Maintain one decreasing stack for elements still seeking their first greater value, and a second for those that already found it and now seek the second.
When a new value arrives, first pop everything it exceeds from the second stack (recording the answer), then move the just-popped items from the first stack into the second.

edge_inputs.description: equal values never count as greater
strictly increasing, none has a second greater
two larger values follow each element directly

stress.description: random array exercising the two-stack cascade across many duplicates
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(0, 30) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
stress.note: small value range packs in ties and repeated comparisons
